description_long: This is a stylized, polygonal wooden cup with a robust, octagonal body and a wide, open mouth rimmed with a thick, gray band. The body is a warm brown color, segmented into flat panels that give it a faceted appearance. A single, sturdy handle is attached to one side, also faceted and matching the body in color and style. The base is slightly narrower than the mouth, with a matching gray band that mirrors the rim. The cup appears solid and functional, suitable for holding beverages, and its design suggests durability and ease of grip. There are no visible decorations, branding, or patterns, giving it a simple, utilitarian look.
description: A polygonal wooden cup with a thick gray rim and base, featuring a sturdy handle and a faceted brown body. The design is simple, robust, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, open mouth and the faceted brown body with no handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick handle attached to the right side and the octagonal shape of the cup.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the handle visible on the left, showing the cup's faceted body and thick rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle on the left edge, displaying the uninterrupted faceted surface of the cup.
